transcript: I have been working with Python and Java for the past five years.
I built a full stack application using React on the frontend and Django on the backend with a PostgreSQL database.
My primary cloud experience is with AWS. I have deployed containerised workloads using Docker and Kubernetes.
I have worked with Pythn and Dockerr in production environments.
I am proficient in js and use nodejs for backend services.

description: Aliases – Amazon Web Services and Google Cloud
transcript: We migrated our infrastructure from amazon web services to google cloud platform.
I use PYTHON, django, TypeScript, and MONGODB daily.
Python Python AWS AWS Docker Docker are my main skills.

description: Long detailed answer with many skills
transcript: Over the course of my career I have worked extensively with Python and TypeScript as my primary programming languages. On the backend I favour FastAPI or Django depending on the project size. For databases I rely on PostgreSQL for relational data and Redis for caching. Our cloud infrastructure runs on AWS and we use Terraform for infrastructure as code. Containerisation is handled by Docker and Kubernetes manages our cluster. CI/CD pipelines run on Jenkins and our source code is managed in GitHub.
I built a SPA with reactjs and the API layer uses expressjs.
We orchestrate containers with Kuberenetes.
Our primary database is Postgress.
I recently switched to golang for writing high-throughput microservices.
I use Kotlin and Swift for mobile development, MongoDB and Redis for data storage, Firebase for real-time features, and deploy on Azure with Ansible playbooks.
Infrastructure is managed with terraform and containers run on k8s.
My systems programming background includes C, C++, and C# for game development.
My favourite Python framework is Jangoo.
I manage CI/CD with Jenkins and GitLab pipelines. Servers are provisioned via Terraform and Ansible. We use Linux (Ubuntu) as our base OS and Nginx as a reverse proxy. All code is tracked in GitHub.
Our team is fully invested in the microsoft azure ecosystem.

I am a full stack engineer who codes in Python, JavaScript, and Go. I build REST APIs with Flask and FastAPI, and use React with Next.js for the frontend. Data is stored in MySQL and Cassandra, with Redis for caching. We host everything on AWS and GCP, and the whole deployment pipeline is orchestrated with Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, and GitHub Actions running on Jenkins.
